summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WaveWatch streaming platform. Backend APIs are fully functional (30/30 tests passed). Frontend loads correctly with working navigation, search, authentication, and admin features. Some minor UI interaction issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Movie cards not properly clickable to navigate to detail pages
Genre filter buttons visible but not responding to clicks properly
Favorite buttons not visible on movie cards

integration_issues.issue: Clicking movie cards redirects to home page instead of movie detail page

passed_tests: Home page loads with hero section and trending movie
Navigation dropdowns (Contenu and Medias) work correctly
Search functionality works and shows results
Movies page loads with content grid and genre filters visible
TV Shows page loads with content
User registration form present and functional
Admin login successful with correct credentials
Theme picker works and changes themes
Admin page accessible with statistics display
Backend API endpoints all functional (30/30 tests passed)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix movie card click navigation to properly route to movie detail pages. Ensure genre filter buttons are properly wired to filter functionality. Add visible favorite buttons to movie cards with proper click handlers.
